Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:24:45 a.m. and concluding at 9:29:12 a.m.

Tracy Tumlin Esq. appearing for Plaintiff California Casualty Indemnity Exchange via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Lee & Sons Construction not appearing.

The Court orders the matter continued to August 2, 2023, at 9:00am in department 505; in order to give Plaintiff time to produce a witness. (D505)
